name: ELSA BLOODSTONE
description: Born into a line of legendary monster hunters, Elsa Bloodstone boasts incredible physical prowess and an innate talent for subduing the creepiest of creatures. The instinct to hunt is in her blood, and every foe she faces inevitably becomes prey ensnared in her traps!
lore: "Born into a long line of monster hunters, Elsa Bloodstone uses her mystic Bloodgem to boost her strength and longevity as she attempts to live up to her family's proud legacy. After what seemed like an eternity hunting demons and monsters in her own collapsing timeline, Elsa was recruited by the Collector to capture rare and dangerous creatures from other realities. When her new partner, Deadpool, went rogue, Elsa was sent to restore order… only to discover that Deadpool had unleashed all the monsters in the Collector's Museum. What fun!

stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 20m, decreasing to 70% at 30m
stats.Fire Rate: The firing interval between shots is 0.12s, with an interval of 0.8s between each round of shooting

abilities.name: MONSTER-PIERCER
abilities.description: Unleash your elephant gun forward. Bullets pierce enemies and deal high damage

abilities.name: INHERITED INSTINCT
abilities.description: Dealing damage increases hunting Instinct. Defeating enemies caught by Smoky Snare grants additional Instinct. Higher Instinct reduces the cooldown of Helix Advance

stats.Special Effect 1: Instinct levels up when it reaches 100, up to 3 levels
stats.Special Effect 2: For each Instinct level gained, reduce the cooldown of Helix Advance by 2s

abilities.name: RUTHLESS PURSUIT
abilities.description: Dash forward, gaining Bonus Health and launching enemies hit. Follow up with a Double-Barrel Blaster shot that propels you backward and Slows enemies. Using either stage empowers your next Double-Barrel Blaster, transforming it into Monster-Piercer

stats.Special Effect 1: Launch up enemies hit, and activate the follow up in 5s
stats.Special Effect 2: Using either stage empowers your next Double-Barrel Blaster, transforming it into Monster-Piercer
stats.Bonus Health: Every unleash of Ruthless Pursuit and Helix Advance grants 30 bonus health. Max bonus health is 75

abilities.name: HELIX ADVANCE
abilities.description: Dash forward. Your next Double-Barrel Blaster becomes Monster-Piercer

stats.Special Effect: In 6s after unleashing Helix Advance, the next Double-Barrel Blaster becomes Monster-Piercer
stats.Special Effect 2: Every unleash of Ruthless Pursuit and Helix Advance grants 30 bonus health. Max bonus health is 75

abilities.name: LIVING BULLET
abilities.description: Fire a Living Bullet round that splits upon impact, seeking nearby enemies and marking each with a Spectral Sigil. Hitting marked targets with Double-Barrel Blaster or Monster-Piercer grants Elsa a brief Speed boost. Living Bullets deal extra damage to shields and enemies with Bonus Health

stats.Special Effect 1: After hits an enemy, the projectile splits to several bullets to trace the enemies in range
stats.Special Effect 2: Projectile deals 40 extra damage to shields and enemies with bonus health

abilities.name: SMOKY SNARE
abilities.description: Launch a trap containing the monster Diablo. Once deployed, it becomes Invisible and Invulnerable. When an enemy triggers it, Diablo Immobilizes and Damages them. Use to dash to the trapped enemy. Enemies can destroy Diablo to break free

stats.Special Effect 1: The trap becomes Invisible and Invulnerable after one-second deployment
stats.Special Effect 2: Defeat the summon to end the Immobolized state early
stats.Special Effect 3: Elsa can dash to the enemy who triggers the trap

abilities.name: APEX PREDATOR
abilities.description: Summon the Glartrox to charge forward. The Glartrox can be recalled to charge back toward Elsa. When colliding with terrain or upon return, it bites fiercely, dealing heavy damage

stats.Special Effect 1: Enemies seized by Glartrox cannot use their abilities until it stops moving
stats.Special Effect 2: Elsa can recall Glartrox at any time
stats.Special Effect 3: When the Glartrox collides with terrain, returns, or reaches its maximum dash duration, it bites fiercely, dealing massive damage. If Glartrox is defeated, the bite will not be triggered
stats.Glartrox Maximum Dash Duration: Maximum durations for dashing and returning are 3.5s each
stats.Special Effect: Glartrox cannot be critical hit. Drag 8 targets at most

received.name: BLOODSTONE'S BOOMBOX BULLETS
received.description: Deadpool hands Jeff the Land Shark a plushie. Jeff can spit it ahead where it'll continuously Taunt nearby enemies and Block Vision, while allies in range are healed! Elsa Bloodstone's Living Bullet changes to special rounds that Taunt targets with Deadpool's chatter, while Slowing, and damaging nearby enemies over time. Elsa can recall the rounds to heal based on damage dealt

base.description: After deploying the Smoky Snare trap, Diablo will monitor the area. If enemies approach, Diablo Immobilizes and Damages them. He also releases a lethal gas, causing continuous area damage.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Devil Dinosaur, Elsa can store and deploy two Smoky Snares.

stats.Special Effect: Up to 2 Smoky Snares can exist on the field simultaneously

base.description: Living Bullet changes to special rounds that Taunt targets with Deadpool's chatter, while Slowing, and damaging nearby enemies over time. After a timer, the bullet auto-recalls, healing Elsa based on the damage dealt while adding one extra gauge block to her Inherited Instinct passive cap.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Deadpool, Deadpool breaks the fourth wall, significantly boosting Instinct acquisition rate.
